title: Iran and Oman in Talks Over Strait of Hormuz Ship Payment System
summary_full: The discussions suggest that the United States and the Iranian government may not be close to reaching a deal to end a war that has badly damaged the global economy.
summary_public: The discussions suggest that the United States and the Iranian government may not be close to reaching a deal to end a war that has badly damaged the global economy.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: not close to reaching a deal to end a war
